assertions.reason: Route navigation from / to /blog used a smooth animated transition; runtime samples captured intermediate opacity and translateY values before settling at final state.
evidence: Transition sample: /blog frame sequence included opacity 0 -> 0.39 -> 0.79 -> 0.99 -> 1 and transform y 8px -> 6.49px -> 2.44px -> 0.22px -> 0px

assertions.reason: With prefers-reduced-motion enabled, route transitions no longer used fade/translate animation and card hover lift was disabled (no transform/shadow change).
evidence: Reduced route sample unique states: / opacity=1 transform=none, /blog opacity=1 transform=none
Reduced card style check (before+hover): transform=none, boxShadow=none, cursor=auto

assertions.reason: Below-fold fade-in block started hidden, became visible when scrolled into viewport, and did not replay when revisiting the same section.
evidence: Before scroll (Another Fade-In Block): opacity=0, transform=matrix(..., 20px), top=1148.86
Second visit after scrolling away/back: opacity=1, transform=none (no replay)

assertions.reason: Post card list revealed with staggered timing; sampled card opacities crossed visibility thresholds sequentially rather than simultaneously.
evidence: Initial card wrappers before list enters viewport: all opacity=0, transform=translateY(20px)

assertions.reason: Card hover animation applies lift and stronger shadow smoothly on hover and returns to original resting state on mouse leave.
evidence: After leave: transform=none, shadow reset, top=214.94

frictions.description: agent-browser required LD_LIBRARY_PATH prefix in this environment for stable command execution.
Single-frame screenshots could miss the exact midpoint of fast route transitions.
frictions.resolution: Added in-page frame sampling of computed opacity/transform during navigation to capture intermediate transition states.
